gradient.description: Background gradient. Stops bound to Color/bg/gradient-start and Color/bg/gradient-end variables for theme awareness.

gradientStart.description: Gradient background start stop. Light: warm white #FCFDFA. Dark: aliases Gray/950.

gradientEnd.description: Gradient background end stop. Light: subtle sage #F2F5EF. Dark: aliases Gray/Black.
